text: Hash voiceover script, the Bucilligence Project Launch Trailer, 45s, AI has changed how we work,
but access to AI should belong to everyone.
Today, AI is fragmented across countless tools, platforms, and closed systems.
Bucilligence is an open source AI development platform designed to help anyone build with AI.
Turn ideas into reality with AI-assisted development workflows.
Connect models, tools, and workflows through an extensible AI ecosystem.
Built openly, extended freely, powered by the community, the future of AI should not be locked away.
The Bucilligence Project, give everyone the power of AI.
